error.sapAppNotDefined: The `manifest.json` file is missing the `sap.app` required section.
error.manifestNotFound: The `manifest.json` file was not found at path: {{- path}}. Check the file exists.
error.minUI5VersionNotMet: The card generator is only supported for projects with UI5 version {{featureVersion}} or higher. Detected minimum UI5 version is {{minUI5Version}}. Please update the minUI5Version in manifest.json and the version in ui5.yaml (if set) to use the card generator feature, as preview could be based on the yaml version if configured.
